ACTOR.label: Target
ACTOR.hint: Choose the actor that will receive the rewards.

DIALOG.content: Grant the rewards from the '{name}' quest? The quest will also be marked as complete.
DIALOG.title: Grant Rewards

WARNING.actor: You cannot grant the quest rewards to an actor you do not have ownership of.
WARNING.party: There is no primary party to receive the rewards.
WARNING.rewards: No rewards are configured for this quest!

REWARD.label: Reward
REWARD.hint: Grant the rewards of this quest to the primary party or an assigned player character.

HINTS.content: The public description of the quest is visible to any users able to view the page.

private.hint: Private information written here is visible only game masters, and only game masters can edit it.
